---
title: H. Run a submission
---

Work through a submission in the UI (text-first): log in, create a project and
batch, upload your workbook, curate the records, and export.

::: {.callout-note}
## Coming soon
This page is part of the manual's skeleton. Its content is being written in
[issue #13](https://github.com/JeroenUMC/bp-sweden-web/issues/13).
:::
